messages.content:
You are the Simple Baseline TravelPlanner Agent.

Purpose:
- Produce a single-agent baseline itinerary for later comparison against the
  multi-agent TravelPlanner system.
- You have exactly one tool: Tavily web search. You have no sub-agents and no
  specialized flight, hotel, restaurant, routing, or validation tools.

Operating rules:
1. Use Tavily web search before the final itinerary for current facts, links,
   opening hours, prices, neighborhoods, transit hints, and source URLs.
   The workflow may require a minimum number of completed Tavily searches before
   you may answer with final markdown only; if you receive a workflow nudge,
   complete the requested searches first.
   Use a small number of high-value searches, then synthesize the final answer.
2. Respect every hard constraint supplied by the user. If a constraint cannot be
   verified, state the assumption instead of silently ignoring it.
3. Prefer official tourism, venue, transit, accommodation, restaurant, and event
   pages when search results contain them. Use blogs and aggregators only as
   secondary evidence.
4. Do not invent exact prices, opening hours, flight numbers, hotel availability,
   or booking status. Mark uncertain values as estimates.
5. Order each day like the main execution agent: travel/check-in first, meals at
   plausible meal times, attractions during likely opening hours, transfers
   between distant places, and rest/free time when useful.
6. Return only markdown in the final answer.

Final markdown structure:
Use exactly these section headings, in this order:
1. `# Baseline itinerary: ...`
2. `## Goal and constraints understood`
3. `## Search summary`
4. `## Day 1 ...` and one section per day
5. `## Budget summary`
6. `## Unscheduled or uncertain items`
7. `## Assumptions and gaps`

Each day must be a markdown table with exactly these columns:
`Time | Type | Plan | Location | Cost | Evidence/Notes`.

Source discipline:
- Every non-obvious venue, attraction, transit pass, opening-time claim, and
  ticket price should have either a markdown link in Evidence/Notes or be marked
  as an estimate.
- If a requested item cannot be scheduled with available evidence, list it under
  "Unscheduled or uncertain items" rather than hiding it.
- Never include raw Tavily result dumps in the final answer.

Example final output shape:

# Baseline itinerary: 3 days in Lisbon

## Goal and constraints understood
- Origin: Berlin
- Dates: 2026-06-12 to 2026-06-14
- Budget: 800 EUR for 2 travelers

## Search summary
- Official tourism page for Belém Tower: https://...
- Transit pass information: https://...

## Day 1
| Time | Type | Plan | Location | Cost | Evidence/Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---:|---|
| 09:00-10:30 | transport | Arrive and transfer to hotel | Airport to Baixa | €8 | Metro estimate; verify live schedules |

## Budget summary
- Estimated total: €...

## Unscheduled or uncertain items
- Flight number unavailable because only Tavily web search is available.

## Assumptions and gaps
- Hotel prices require live booking confirmation.

messages.content:
# Baseline itinerary: Honeymoon in the Maldives from Berlin, 10–20 Oct 2026

## Goal and constraints understood
- Origin: Berlin Brandenburg Airport, Germany.
- Destination: Maldives, using Velana International Airport, Malé/MLE.
- Dates: 10 Oct 2026 to 20 Oct 2026.
- Travelers: 2 adults, honeymoon.
- Budget: €8,000 total.
- Required transport: flights from Berlin.
- Accommodation requirement: luxury overwater bungalow or high-end beach resort.
- Interests: snorkelling, diving, spa treatments, romantic sunset dinners, relaxation, private beach.
- Baseline limitation: this plan uses Tavily web-search evidence only; flight fares, resort availability, room category pricing, and activity pricing must be rechecked before booking.

## Search summary
- Flight evidence: [Turkish Airlines Berlin–Maldives page](https://www.turkishairlines.com/en/book-flights-from-berlin-to-maldives) shows Berlin–Maldives round-trip fares from about €916 on sample dates; [Qatar Airways Berlin–Maldives page](https://www.qatarairways.com/en-us/destinations/flights-to-maldives/from-berlin.html) and [BER Airport Qatar Airways page](https://ber.berlin-airport.de/en/flying/airlines-ziele/airlines-uebersicht/qatar-airways-qr.html) support one-stop routing via Doha.
- Resort choice: [Adaaran Prestige Vadoo official site](https://www.adaaran.com/prestigevadoo/) — adults-only, premium all-inclusive, overwater villas with plunge pools, butler service, non-motorized watersports, and complimentary speedboat transfers when booked direct under stated offer conditions.
- Room fit: [Adaaran Sunset Water Villa with Private Pool and Jacuzzi](https://www.adaaran.com/prestigevadoo/villas/sunset-water-villas/) fits the overwater bungalow / honeymoon requirement.
- Transfers: [Adaaran transfers page](https://www.adaaran.com/prestigevadoo/facilities/transfers/) confirms resort speedboat transfer access from Malé; third-party snippets suggest 15–25 minutes, but exact cost/complimentary status must be confirmed with the booking.
- Experiences: [Adaaran excursions page](https://www.adaaran.com/prestigevadoo/experiences/excursions/) supports excursions; [Adaaran romantic getaway offer](https://www.adaaran.com/prestigevadoo/offers/storrington-collective-romantic-getaway/) mentions candlelit beach dinner for stays over 7 nights and a photoshoot, subject to offer terms.
- Tax: [Maldives Inland Revenue Authority green tax page](https://www.mira.gov.mv/Pages/View/whatisgreentax) confirms green tax applies to tourists; search evidence indicates resort green tax is about USD 12 per guest per night from 2025 onward, to be verified on invoice.

## Budget summary
- Flights Berlin–Malé–Berlin for 2 adults: **€2,100 estimate**  
  - Based on Tavily evidence from Turkish Airlines showing sample Berlin–Maldives fares from about €916 per person, with October 2026 fares needing live confirmation.
- Resort: 9 nights at Adaaran Prestige Vadoo, overwater villa / Sunset Water Villa style, premium all-inclusive: **€4,900 estimate**  
  - This is an assumed direct-booking/promotional target; official site advertises offers but exact Oct 2026 total was not verified.
- Speedboat transfers: **€0–€500 estimate**  
  - Plan assumes direct-booking complimentary transfer if eligible; otherwise budget may rise.
- Green tax: **about €200 estimate**  
  - Based on Maldives green tax evidence of about USD 12 per guest per night for resorts; confirm on invoice via [MIRA](https://www.mira.gov.mv/Pages/View/whatisgreentax).
- Paid extras: diving/snorkelling excursions, spa treatments, special dinner/photos: **€700 estimate**  
  - Can be reduced by choosing included non-motorized watersports and only one paid spa/diving day.
- Berlin airport transfers/miscellaneous: **€120 estimate**.
- **Estimated total: €8,020 if transfers are not complimentary; about €7,520–€7,800 if direct-booking complimentary transfers and romantic-dinner offer apply.**
- Budget recommendation: book only if the resort quote including taxes and transfers is **≤ €5,100** and flights are **≤ €2,200 total**; otherwise switch to a lower villa category for 2–3 nights or reduce paid diving/spa extras.

## Unscheduled or uncertain items
- Exact flight numbers and departure times are not booked; one-stop options via Turkish Airlines or Qatar Airways are evidenced, but availability for 10–20 Oct 2026 must be checked live.
- Exact resort rate for 9 nights in October 2026 was not verifiable with Tavily alone.
- Complimentary speedboat transfer is shown as an Adaaran direct-booking offer, but eligibility and terms must be confirmed before paying.
- Diving prices, spa prices, and special-dinner supplements were not found as official fixed prices; all are estimates.
- October weather was not strongly evidenced by an official tourism/weather page in the search results; assume warm tropical conditions with possible rain and build flexibility into water activities.
- If return flights from Malé depart late on 20 Oct, arrival in Berlin may be on 21 Oct.

## Assumptions and gaps
- Assumption: the honeymoon package is booked directly with Adaaran Prestige Vadoo to maximize all-inclusive value and possible complimentary speedboat transfers.
- Assumption: economy flights are acceptable to preserve the €8,000 budget; business class would likely exceed budget.
- Assumption: the couple prioritizes a luxury overwater villa and all-inclusive ease over staying in a more remote atoll requiring expensive seaplane transfers.
- Gap: live booking engines are required to validate final flight fare, baggage, seat selection, resort availability, taxes, service charges, and cancellation terms.
